analysis.problem: Закъсняване или отлагане на космически мисии поради фактори като лошо време или технически проблеми
analysis.root_cause: Недостатъчна издръжливост или резервни капацитети в инфраструктурата и технологиите, използвани за космическите мисии
leverage_points: Разработване на по-устойчиви и надеждни технологии за космическите мисии
Увеличаване на резервните капацитети и инфраструктурата за космическите програми

proposed_actions.action: Инвестиции в изследвания и разработки на нови технологии за космически полети
proposed_actions.measurable_goal: Увеличение на процента на успешно изпълнени космически мисии

proposed_actions.action: Създаване на запасни плани и резервни капацитети за космическите мисии
proposed_actions.measurable_goal: Намаление на броя на отлаганите или закъсняващите космически мисии

evidence: Факт 1: Poor weather scrubs Cargo Dragon mission launch to the space station
Факт 2: SpaceX targets May 19 for debut of Starship Version 3, Launch Pad 2, което показва усилия за развитие на нови технологии
analysis.generalization: Този проблем е свързан с домейна на цивилизацията, тъй като космическите мисии и техните резултати могат да имат значително влияние върху икономиката, науката и обществените възгледи
analysis.summary: Закъсненията или отлаганията на космически мисии поради технически или метеорологични причини представляват среден риск за космическата индустрия и изискват инвестиции в нови технологии и резервни капацитети.

raw_items.title: NASA, SpaceX launch Dragon mission with 6,500 pounds of science and supplies to the space station
raw_items.summary: Liftoff of the resupply mission, atop a Falcon 9 rocket from Space Launch Complex 40 at Cape Canaveral Space Force Station is scheduled for 6:05 p.m. EDT (2205 UTC). The Cargo Dragon is loaded with 6,500 pounds of science and supplies for the space station. <a class="mh-excerpt-more" href="https://spaceflightnow.com/2026/05/15/live-coverage-spacex-makes-another-attempt-to-launch-space-station-cargo-mission/" title="NASA, SpaceX launch Dragon mission with 6,500 pounds of science and supplies to t

raw_items.title: ULA confirms successful solid rocket booster test as Vulcan anomaly investigation continues
raw_items.summary: The static fire test was conducted by Northrop Grumman, the manufacturer of the GEM 63XL solid rocket booster that can be used to help power United Launch Alliance’s Vulcan rockets. An in-flight anomaly was observed on one of those back in mid-February. <a class="mh-excerpt-more" href="https://spaceflightnow.com/2026/05/14/ula-confirms-successful-solid-rocket-booster-test-as-vulcan-anomaly-investigation-continues/" title="ULA confirms successful solid rocket booster test as Vulcan anomaly invest

raw_items.title: SpaceX targets May 19 for debut of Starship Version 3, Launch Pad 2
raw_items.summary: The mission will test a host of changes made to both the launch vehicle and the launch infrastructure as SpaceX prepares to support the Artemis 3 mission in 2027.

raw_items.title: For a second time, poor weather scrubs Cargo Dragon mission launch to the space station
raw_items.summary: SpaceX’s 34th mission as part of the Commercial Resupply Services 2 contract with NASA will deliver 6,500 pounds of science and supplies to the International Space Station. Liftoff of the Falcon 9 rocket from pad 40 at Cape Canaveral Space Force Station is scheduled for Friday, May 15, at 6:05 p.m. EDT (2205 UTC). <a class="mh-excerpt-more" href="https://spaceflightnow.com/2026/05/12/live-coverage-nasa-spacex-to-launch-34th-cargo-dragon-mission-to-the-space-station/" title="For a second time, po

raw_items.title: Space exploration
raw_items.summary: Space exploration is the physical investigation of outer space by uncrewed robotic space probes and through human spaceflight.While the observation of objects in space, known as astronomy, predates reliable recorded history, it was the development of large and relatively efficient rockets during the mid-twentieth century that allowed physical space exploration to become a reality. raw_items.title: Vision for Space Exploration - Wikipedia
raw_items.summary: The Vision for Space Exploration sought to implement a sustained and affordable human and robotic program to explore the Solar System and beyond ...

raw_items.title: SpaceX
raw_items.summary: Space Exploration Technologies Corporation, doing business as SpaceX (stylized as SPACEX in upper caps), is a private American aerospace and artificial intelligence company headquartered at the Starbase development site in Starbase, Texas. Since its founding in 2002, the company has made numerous advances in rocket propulsion, reusable launch vehicles, human spaceflight and satellite constellation
